claims.summary: Raw projection norms should be visible before normalization hides collapse or amplification.
claims.disposition: Verified current codec evidence records raw and normalized projection behavior with bounded health checks.

claims.summary: Basis overlap and f32/f64 precision need deterministic regression coverage.
claims.disposition: Verified current basis-health and precision-delta regressions.

claims.summary: Mechanical codec health cannot by itself prove felt continuity.
claims.disposition: Route any felt-continuity claim through a capture-first comparison without changing transport or gain.
